name: Arête
notes: Fashion marketplace iOS app connecting emerging designers with trendsetters; pre-seed funded; based in New York, NY.

name: Zure Solaris
notes: London-based beauty/skincare brand for men and women; UK-registered company (GOV.UK Companies House).

name: Rosie's Chips
notes: Grass-fed tallow potato chip brand; origins in Central PA but currently operating out of Los Angeles, CA.

name: Moddule
notes: Founded 2022, headquartered in Næstved (also Copenhagen), Denmark. Supply chain/logistics visibility platform for LSPs and 3PLs. Raised $1.5M pre-seed.

name: Droptics
notes: Founded 2025; consumer eye-drop brand targeting digital eye strain for the gaming/streaming generation; products sold at Walmart, Target, and Amazon. HQ Honolulu, HI.

name: Lucille
notes: Lucille Health — senior nutrition shake startup; founder Jess Haghani; backed by Able Partners, IRIS Ventures, New Fare Partners; launched publicly 2026; Cambridge, MA. Matched as the most likely 'Lucille' startup in this CRM context.

name: Limelight
notes: B2B creator ad platform for enterprise GTM via content partnerships with B2B creators; founded 2023; Marina Del Rey (LA area), CA. Raised $1.1M pre-seed. Multiple companies named Limelight exist — matched the most recently venture-funded startup.

name: Salmon
notes: Salmon Labs (Salmon); AI engine for enterprise growth/revenue teams; co-founded by Kevin Liu; San Francisco, CA; raised $3M seed. Multiple 'Salmon' companies exist; matched the US-based AI startup most likely in a VC CRM.

name: Iris Financial
notes: AI-native CFO/FP&A platform for CPG brands; domain irisfinance.co confirmed; headquartered in Chicago, IL; raised $6.2M.

name: Oddball
notes: Digital modernization agency for federal government; SDVOSB; HQ at 1775 Tysons Blvd, McLean, VA; ~366 employees; backed by Falfurrias Management Partners.

name: Autolane
notes: Curbside operating system for autonomous vehicles; founded 2024; Palo Alto, CA; raised $7.4M from Draper Associates and Hyperplane.

name: JigsawML
notes: AI-powered cloud intelligence platform (visualization, asset management, infra diagrams); founded 2023; dual HQ Boston, MA and San Francisco, CA; won 2024 CloudX Award for Cloud Management.
